title: strophanthus mirabilis
intro: Strophanthus mirabilis is a flowering plant species in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant contains a number of bioactive compounds, including glycosides and alkaloids, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of heart conditions and as a digitalis substitute. The health benefits of Strophanthus mirabilis include its ability to improve cardiac function, reduce blood pressure, and act as a diuretic. Strophanthus mirabilis is typically prepared for medicinal use through the extraction of its active compounds, which can be found in various herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions.
